modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty merging a ticket into another ticket in TeamDynamix

full_description_text:  
An end user submitted a ticket via the self-service form in TeamDynamix. They are now facing challenges with the process of merging this ticket into another existing ticket. The user is unsure of the steps required to complete this action and is seeking guidance on how to proceed.
